article.title: I tried the redesigned Google Wallet app, and it fixes my 2 biggest complaints
article.summary: It’s a big deal whenever Google redesigns one of its Android apps, and that’s especially true for an app as big as Google Wallet. We’ve been tracking evidence of a major Google Wallet update since as early as last September, and after months of waiting, it’s finally live. Google began rolling out its Wallet redesign on April 10, and after using it on my Pixel 10a for about a day, I can confirm that the new design was worth the wait. Here’s what it looks like in action.
article.title_zh: 我試用了重新設計的 Google Wallet 應用程式，它解決了我最大的 2 個困擾
article.summary_zh: Google 推出了期待已久的 Google Wallet 重大更新，此次改版針對該應用程式的主要問題進行了改進。

article.title: MacBook user explains why he files the sharp metal edges off his Apple laptops — unibody design facilitates a surprisingly deep roundover
article.summary: Tech DIYer Kent Walters has used a metalworking file to round over the corners of his MacBook. Apparently, some people freak out about this.
article.title_zh: MacBook 用戶解釋為何他銼掉 Apple 筆電尖銳的金屬邊角——一體式設計促成令人驚訝的深度圓角處理
article.summary_zh: 科技 DIY 愛好者 Kent Walters 使用金屬銼工具將 MacBook 的邊角磨圓。顯然有些人對此感到擔憂。

article.title: Benchmarking Nvidia's RTX Neural Texture Compression tech that can reduce VRAM usage by over 80%
article.summary: We put RTX Neural Texture Compression to the test with multiple GPUs and on a laptop.
article.title_zh: Nvidia RTX Neural Texture Compression 技術效能測試 — 可將 VRAM 使用量減少 80% 以上
article.summary_zh: 我們在多款 GPU 和筆記型電腦上測試了 RTX Neural Texture Compression 的性能。

article.title: Chinese Nvidia Cloud Partner procured 300 servers with banned AI GPUs worth $92 million — shares of data center supplier Sharetronic plummet following Super Micro smuggling arrest
article.summary: Publicly available documents reveal that a Chinese AI data center company sold servers that were designed for Nvidia H100 chips despite the U.S. export ban.
article.title_zh: 中國 Nvidia 雲端合作夥伴採購 300 台價值 9,200 萬美元的禁用 AI GPU 伺服器 — 超微走私被捕後數據中心供應商 Sharetronic 股價暴跌
article.summary_zh: 公開文件揭露一家中國 AI 數據中心公司銷售了為 Nvidia H100 芯片設計的伺服器，儘管面臨美國出口禁令。

article.title: AI models are terrible at betting on soccer—especially xAI Grok
article.summary: AI models from Google, OpenAI, and Anthropic lost money betting on soccer matches over a Premier League season, in a new study suggesting even the most advanced systems struggle to analyze the real world over long periods. The “KellyBench” report released this week by AI start-up General Reasoning highlights the gap between AI’s rapidly advancing capabilities in certain tasks, such as writing software, and its shortcomings in other kinds of human problems. London-based General Reasoning tested eight top AI systems in a virtual re-creation of the 2023–24 Premier League season, providing them with detailed historical data and statistics about each team and previous games. The AIs were instructed to build models that would maximize returns and manage risk. Read full article Comments
article.title_zh: AI 模型在足球賭博上表現糟糕——特別是 xAI Grok
article.summary_zh: 來自 Google、OpenAI 和 Anthropic 的 AI 模型在英超聯賽賭球中虧損，一項新研究表明即使是最先進的系統也難以長期分析現實世界。

article.title: Report: Apple tops global smartphone market for first time in Q1 as overall shipments drop
article.summary: Counterpoint Research has published its latest report on global smartphone shipments for Q1 2026, showing that strong demand for the iPhone 17 helped Apple take the top spot in the market for the first time in a first quarter. Here are the details. more…
article.title_zh: 報告：Apple 在 Q1 首次登頂全球智慧型手機市場，整體出貨量下降
article.summary_zh: Counterpoint Research 發布 Q1 2026 全球智慧型手機出貨量報告，顯示 iPhone 17 的強勁需求幫助 Apple 首次在第一季度佔據市場第一名。

article.title: What Gemini features you get with Google AI Plus, Pro, & Ultra [April 2026]
article.summary: At I/O 2025 , Google One AI Premium (and Gemini Advanced ) became “Google AI Pro,” while a higher, more expensive tier was introduced with “Google AI Ultra.” more…
article.title_zh: Google AI Plus、Pro 和 Ultra 的 Gemini 功能 [2026年4月]
article.summary_zh: 在 I/O 2025 上，Google One AI Premium（及 Gemini Advanced）改名為「Google AI Pro」，並推出了更高階且更昂貴的「Google AI Ultra」層級。

article.title: Google’s Tensor G5 is ‘good enough’ — but 2026 flagships are leaving the Pixel 10 behind
article.summary: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=Qn_m9KKXjus In one hand, I hold the Xiaomi 17 Ultra — a powerhouse driven by Qualcomm’s benchmark-dominating Snapdragon 8 Elite Gen 5 . In the other, Google’s Pixel 10 Pro XL, powered by the latest Tensor G5 chip. On paper, Google’s latest flagship looks far less impressive in terms of raw performance, a fact Pixel fans have just come to accept over the years and one that’s a constant thorn in the side of those who love a bit of mobile gaming every now and again. But benchmarks don’t always tell the full story — we seldom notice the extra 5% or 10% difference while browsing the web or scrolling feeds. Likewise, modern Android games aren’t always built to push cutting-edge silicon to its limits, and real-world performance often depends just as much on optimiz
article.title_zh: Google Tensor G5 已『足夠好』——但 2026 年旗艦機正在將 Pixel 10 甩在身後
article.summary_zh: 一手是搭載高通 Snapdragon 8 Elite Gen 5 的小米 17 Ultra，另一手是搭載最新 Tensor G5 晶片的 Google Pixel 10 Pro XL，紙面上 Google 最新旗艦機的表現看起來遠不如對手。

article.title: At least for now, Liquid Glass in Pixelmator Pro remains a Creator Studio exclusive
article.summary: Earlier this year, Apple introduced Apple Creator Studio – a new subscription bundle that provides users access to all Apple pro software on Mac and iPad, such as Final Cut Pro, Logic Pro, Motion, and Pixelmator Pro. With this launch, we got Pixelmator Pro on iPad for the first time – and a new Liquid Glass design on Mac. However, the latter is yet to be released for people who already paid for the app, and it doesn’t look like that’s going to change. more…
article.title_zh: 至少目前為止，Pixelmator Pro 中的 Liquid Glass 仍為 Creator Studio 獨占功能
article.summary_zh: Apple 今年推出 Apple Creator Studio 訂閱服務，提供用戶在 Mac 和 iPad 上使用 Final Cut Pro、Logic Pro、Motion 和 Pixelmator Pro 等專業軟體，首次在 iPad 上推出 Pixelmator Pro 並推出新的 Liquid Glass 功能。
